title: Junior Digital Marketing Executive (SEO & PPC)
description:
Job Summary

We are looking for a highly motivated and enthusiastic Junior Digital Marketing Executive with 2-3 years of hands-on experience in Search Engine Optimization (SEO) and Search Engine Marketing (SEM). Based in our Singapore regional hub, this role will be instrumental in driving our digital presence and lead generation efforts across various APAC markets. You'll work closely with the regional marketing team and local country teams, and will also report directly to the Global In-Charge of SEO/SEM. This ensures alignment with global digital strategies and provides opportunities for advanced learning and collaboration. A key aspect of this role will be staying abreast of the rapidly evolving landscape of AI in SEO and adapting strategies accordingly.

Key Responsibilities

SEO Management

· Conduct keyword research to identify new opportunities and optimize existing content for relevant search terms in APAC markets.

· Perform on-page SEO optimization, including meta descriptions, title tags, header tags, and content optimization.

· Assist with technical SEO audits and work with web development teams to implement recommendations (e.g., site speed, sitemaps, robots.txt).

· Monitor and report on SEO performance using tools like Econda Analytics and Google Search Console.

· Continuously research and keep up-to-date with the latest AI trends and their impact on SEO, including AI Overviews, generative AI in search, and answer engine optimization (AEO).

· Stay up-to-date with general SEO trends, algorithm changes, and best practices.


SEM Campaign Management

· Assist in the planning of paid search campaigns on platforms like Google Ads, Microsoft Bing, and Baidu/Naver/Yahoo! Japan (depending on markets).

· Work closely with and manage local country agencies responsible for the execution and optimization of these paid search campaigns.

· Provide guidance and support to agencies on keyword research, ad copy development, and targeting strategies.

· Monitor agency performance, analyze campaign data, and provide recommendations for bid adjustments, budget allocation, and overall strategy improvements.


Content & Website Support

· Support website updates and ensure content is optimized for search engines.

· Assist in maintaining website health and user experience.


Reporting & Analysis

· Track, analyze, and report on key digital marketing metrics, including orders, revenue, and Return on Ad Spend (ROAS), across various platforms.

· Provide insights and recommendations for optimizing digital marketing performance.

Regional & Global Collaboration

· Work closely with regional and local marketing teams to ensure digital strategies align with overall business objectives.

· Collaborate with and report to the Global In-Charge of SEO/SEM to align on global strategies, share best practices, and contribute to international initiatives, particularly regarding AI's influence on search.

· Support digital marketing initiatives for specific APAC countries.


Qualifications

· Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field.

· 2-3 years of proven experience in digital marketing with a strong focus on SEO and SEM.

· Hands-on experience with Econda Analytics, Google Search Console, Google Ads, Microsoft Bing, Baidu, Naver, and Yahoo! Japan is essential.

· Familiarity with SEO tools (e.g., SEMrush, Ahrefs, Moz) is a strong plus.

· Understanding of digital marketing principles and best practices.

· Demonstrated interest in and willingness to learn about the impact of Artificial Intelligence on search engine optimization and marketing.

· Excellent analytical skills and ability to interpret data to drive actionable insights.

· Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams and cultures.

· Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

· Proactive, self-motivated, and eager to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment.

· Experience in a B2B environment or the manufacturing/industrial sector is a plus.

· Strong proficiency in English is required. Additional proficiency in APAC languages will be an advantage, as the role involves supporting regional markets.



Working hours:

Mon to Fri 9am - 6pm

Company Overview

If you’re seeking for employment or employees, you’re at the right place.Welcome to Flintex Consulting, a leading Recruitment Agency in Singapore.


We Match                                            We Guide                                            We Place


We specialize in Technology, BFSI, Human Resource & Administration, Engineering & Manufacturing, Sales & Marketing,Finance & Accounting sectors.We cater to the needs of a) individual job candidates and b) companies seeking for the right employees to drive their business.


We have been able to construe and bridge the needs and demands of our individual and corporate clients. Our wide industry expertise and select client base enable us to foster fruitful careers rather than short-term jobs and placements.Our advanced placement platform is designed to match employee skill sets with current vacancies with perfect accuracy. We utilize an efficient, systematic and ultra-precise recruitment method that surpasses industry standards.


Flintex Consulting has been successful in collaborating multiple leading employers, vendors and clients. We also offer valuable insight to candidates and companies to maximize their recruitment efforts. Candidates are mentored towards finding the best-fit jobs to help build successful careers.We cover all levels of placement, from entry level professionals to mid-level and CEO level posts.We promise to provide the best suited jobs through our research-based methodologies merged with our top qualified personnel.


Flintex Consulting promises to grow your career the right way. Whether you are a client or a candidate, we have a streamlined platform to match your needs efficiently. With professional, efficient, and timely services, leave it to us when it comes to your Job-Related needs.We take pride in collaborating with leading employers, vendors, and clients. This helps us provide you with extensive job postings across all Major Industries. Additionally, we offer valuable insights and other personalized services designed to maximize productivity and results when it comes to job search.
